basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) has officially announced the Guest Faculty (Mathematics) Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy under Advertisement No. NITMGH/ES/G-F/MA/2026-27/467. Candidates who have completed or submitted their Ph.D. thesis in Mathematics are eligible to apply for this contractual position. Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 65,000. Interested and eligible candidates can submit their online applications on or before 09 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D (completed or thesis submitted) in Mathematics
qualification.details: Ph.D (completed or thesis submitted) in Mathematics

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty (Mathematics) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Meghalaya to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Meghalaya Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Guest Faculty (Mathematics) position at NIT Meghalaya is 09-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Guest Faculty (Mathematics) post is a Ph.D. (completed or thesis submitted) in Mathematics.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Guest Faculty (Mathematics) position at NIT Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty (Mathematics) recruitment will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. When will the online interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The online interview for the Guest Faculty position is scheduled to be conducted on 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the appointment?
faq.answer: The appointment is contractual, and the end of the appointment is scheduled for 11-12-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
